COMMITTEES:
AGRICULTURE AND WATER RESOURCES
ELECTIONS
LOCAL GOVERNMENT; VICE CHAIR
TRANSPORTATION
VETERANS AFFAIRS

JOINT COMMITTEES:
RULES
AUDIT
FAIRS ALLOCATION AND CLASSIFICATION

SELECT COMMITTEES:
STATUTES REVISION
EXPENDITURE PRACTICES
SMALL BUSINESS ENTERPRISES
FAIRS AND RURAL ISSUES

SUBCOMMITTEES:
DAIRY PRACTICES AND MARKETING

LEGISLATIVE ADDRESS

STATE CAPITOL - ROOM 2082
SACRAMENTO, CA 95814
(916) 445-9686

DISTRICT OFFICE ADDRESS

9620 CENTER AVE. SUITE 100
RANCHO CUCAMONGA, CA 91730
(714) 466-6882

SAN BERNARDINO AREA

TOLL FREE
(800) 564-9622
(800) 834-9822

Senate
California Legislature

RUBEN S. AYALA
SENATOR

CHAIRMAN
AGRICULTURE AND WATER RESOURCES COMMITTEE

July 30, 1991

Mr. Kevin Braatenmoen
Political Reform Consultant
California Fair Political
Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Braatenmoen:

Per your conversation, this date, with Ron Lofstrom of
Ron Lofstrom and Associates, I request a written opinion on
the following question:

Is it legal for an incumbent (myself), to schedule a
fundraiser during a nonelection year?

I have been given conflicting information on the
scheduling of fundraisers and, therefore, would appreciate
your opinion.

Respectfully,

RUBEN S. AYALA
Senator, 34th District

RSA:sm
